temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) The scene opens with a high-angle shot of a car driving down a narrow, tree-lined road. The camera then cuts to an interior view from the back seat, showing the silhouettes of two men in the front. The man on the right is driving, and the man on the left is in the passenger seat. The windshield wipers are moving, indicating it's raining. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes the setting and introduces the two main characters, Chen Ge and Xiao Bing, as they travel together.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Anxious, slightly exasperated. 2) Background sounds: The sound of the car engine and windshield wipers.)
(00:04-00:07) A close-up shot reveals the driver, Chen Ge. He has a distressed and weary expression, with sweat on his face. His right hand, which is wrapped in white bandages, rests on his forehead as he stares ahead with a troubled look. (Storyline: This close-up emphasizes the protagonist's physical and emotional distress, hinting at a recent or ongoing struggle that is weighing on him.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Pained, weary. 2) Background sounds: The low hum of the car engine.)
